name: Squash and Potatoes with Chicken on Pasta with Passion
recipeIngredient: 2 small red new potatoes, cooked and cubed
4 ounces chicken breast fillet, meat only, sliced
2 tablespoons chopped fresh cilantro, or more
4 teaspoons Jump Up Hot Sauce with Passion (see recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in the microwave until just done. Let cool.
2. Cook pasta until al dente in plenty of boiling water seasoned with a halved garlic clove. Drain, rinse, and set aside.
3. Cut the skinless boneless chicken breast half into diagonal strips, then cut strips into bite-sized pieces. Toss the chicken with the oils to coat.
4. Heat a wok to high; add the chicken to sear until mostly pink. Add sweet onion and cook 2 to 3 minutes more. Add red bell pepper, cilantro, and green onions, and cook about 2 minutes.
5. Mix cornstarch with chicken broth. Make a well in the wok and pour in the sauce mixture. Cook to thicken for about 2 minutes, then add Jump Up Hot Sauce with Passion and orange juice. Stir until thickened.
6. Arrange cooked potatoes on top. Reduce heat to medium; cover and cook through. Taste and adjust seasoning with more hot sauce, black pepper, if desired.
7. Add pasta and toss before serving. Serve immediately with palate cleanser like grapes.
